text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The coveted Grand Mile. I've<n>accumulated all the
victories<n>necessary to be named the Ruler of<n>the
Mile!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A junior-year G1 mile, the Oka Sho,<n>the NHK Mile
Cup, the Mile<n>Championship, the February Stakes,
the Victoria Mile, and the Yasuda<n>Kinen—all seven
are mine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm the Ruler of the Mile and theAll-Rounder. Has my characterderailed?! ...Aaand, that worry haspassed as quickly as it came.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This achievement is my chance to talk<n>to many
other Umamusume I only had<n>the most superficial
links to before...<n>This is my link to the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am the Ruler of the Mile! I'm gonna<n>keep this up
and dominate all<n>distances!
